prompt: Create a cinematic vertical anime illustration of a glamorous adult woman standing on a nighttime train platform beside a stopped vintage commuter train. The main subject is a tall, elegant woman with dark wavy bob hair, wearing a cream wide-brim hat, pearl earrings, a pearl necklace, black gloves, a fitted ivory evening dress with detailed wrinkles and draping, and a long beige trench coat slipping open and flowing behind her. She holds a structured black handbag with gold chain details in one hand and lightly touches her neck with the other, posing confidently in a three-quarter view. Her face should be softly obscured or left featureless to preserve anonymity, while the outfit and silhouette remain highly detailed. The setting is a glossy tiled urban station platform at night with strong warm reflections on the floor, overhead fluorescent lights, dark power lines, and dramatic perspective lines. On the left, include exactly 1 silver vintage train with glowing headlights and blurred destination signage; on the right and background, include exactly 3 secondary commuters: one dark suited figure cropped in the foreground, one person carrying a tall black instrument case, and one distant commuter walking along the platform. Add exactly 2 illuminated station signs overhead: a large red neon sign partially reading A Trai and a smaller orange advertisement sign with decorative unreadable lettering. Use a high-detail manga/comic style with bold ink outlines, realistic fabric folds, noir lighting, warm gold highlights, deep shadows, slight motion blur on the train, and a fashionable luxury editorial mood. Vertical 9:16 composition, low-angle perspective, subject centered slightly right, no watermark, no extra readable text beyond the two signs.
